repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1: sharp joint-misspecification interval and rectangular no-go for offline policy value under joint propensity/outcome misspecification

published_prior_art.cite: YadlowskyNamkoongBasuDuchiTian2022 and ZhangXuTan2025 give mean-side/outcome-side MSM tightening templates, not this offline-policy mean-vs-quantile dichotomy

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1 plus failed pid_qte_marginal_sensitivity_v1: prior repo already flagged joint compatibility and finite-support quantile-process pasting as the hard issue

published_prior_art.cite: HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 gives MSM-only off-policy sharp endpoint; DornGuo2023 gives quantile-clipping MSM geometry; neither states this fixed-center conditional-quantile tube endpoint

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1: non-rectangular phase-transition / rectangular post-processing warning for the same qid family

published_prior_art.cite: HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 and ZhangXuTan2025 do not state the proposed Delta_rect equality/strictness diagnostic
HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 already derives the MSM-only off-policy EIF and one-step estimator; ChernozhukovEtAl2018 supplies the cross-fit orthogonality template

novelty_flags.label: proposal handoff / comparator positioning
novelty_flags.one_line: The prose claims a correction to the Hess/Frauen workflow, but no statement is phrased as a strict tightening, equivalence frontier, or non-representability theorem against their published endpoint/estimator; the required comparator-promise table is also missing.

novelty_flags.label: related_work / quantile-tube comparator set
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter missed ZhangXuTan2025 deMSM, which adds potential-outcome distribution-shift constraints to MSM and is closer to a law-level tube than the cited eMSM mean-bound paper.

soundness_flags.label: honest_scope reductions / thm:quantile-coupled-endpoint
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed reduction epsilon(x)=0 -> Hess/Frauen MSM endpoint is algebraically false because Qcpl_plus becomes min{Qclip_plus,Q0,U}, not Qclip_plus, unless an extra inactive-cap condition is imposed.

soundness_flags.label: honest_scope reductions / thm:quantile-coupled-endpoint
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed Gamma=1 face is also wrong as stated: under no hidden confounding the arm law is point-identified by Qobs, so an additional quantile tube can only restrict compatibility, not replace the endpoint by min{Qobs,Q0+epsilon,U}.

soundness_flags.label: thm:mean-decoupling
soundness_flags.one_line: The additive mean-tube endpoint V_MSM_plus + E[pi epsilon] does not follow from def:mean-tube-class, which constrains the same arm mean around m0 and should intersect/cap rather than add an independent slack.

soundness_flags.label: conj:eif-one-step
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposed EIF is not a concrete mathematical object because phi_rect_excess_plus and Chat_a_plus are only named roles, not formulas or optimization-defined functionals.

soundness_flags.label: ass:center-law
soundness_flags.one_line: The tagged standard condition 'interior center law inside the support' is an analyst-specified compatibility restriction, not a standard FanPark2010 assumption as stated.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rewrite the quantile-tube model so the sanity faces are correct: epsilon=infinity or an explicit inactive-cap condition should recover Hess/Frauen, while Gamma=1 should either give Qobs if compatible or an empty restricted class if incompatible.

Replace the mean-tube theorem with an actual intersection formula such as min/max of the MSM mean endpoint and the m0 +/- epsilon tube, or explicitly redefine the mean benchmark as a post-MSM rectangular outer envelope rather than a class restriction.

Add ZhangXuTan2025 deMSM as a named comparator and state precisely why a fixed-center conditional quantile tube for offline policy value is not subsumed by their potential-outcome distribution-shift bounds.
Give an explicit formula for phi_rect_excess_plus and a concrete cross-fit estimator map for Chat_a_plus before making the EIF and root-n inference conjecture load-bearing.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version and require a semantic rewrite of the tube model and sanity reductions before any Stage 0 advance.
